name: Cantel Medical Corp.
description: Cantel Medical Corp. is a leading global company dedicated to delivering infection prevention products, services, and solutions for patients, caregivers, and other healthcare providers. The company specializes in providing innovative infection prevention and control products in the endoscopy, water purification and filtration, healthcare disposables, and dialysis segments. Through its comprehensive portfolio, Cantel Medical helps minimize infection risks, improve patient outcomes, and enhance clinical efficiencies worldwide.
